zh.lifeSummary: 當Georg Beyer於1569年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，他的父親Valentin Beyer26歲，母親Sabina Margaretha Meissner24歲。他於1594年7月2日與Sybilla Bauer在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1644年2月17日在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Georg Beyer于1569年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩时，他的父亲Valentin Beyer26岁，母亲Sabina Margaretha Meissner24岁。他于1594年7月2日与Sybilla Bauer在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1644年2月17日在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ewald, Klaus, Alois, Arno, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Theodor.
German, Scandinavian, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.
Dutch: variant of Beijer, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.
from an agent derivative of Middle High German bāgen ‘to quarrel, to pride oneself’, hence a nickname for a quarrelsome or boastful person.

variants.name: Beyers
meanings: Dutch: variant of Beijers, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Georg Beyer was born in 1569, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Valentin Beyer, was 26 and his mother, Sabina Margaretha Meissner, was 24. He married Sybilla Bauer on 2 July 1594, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 17 February 1644, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Georg Beyer est né en 1569, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Valentin Beyer, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sabina Margaretha Meissner, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Sybilla Bauer le 2 juillet 1594, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1644, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ko.of Kirchberg, Chemnitz, Saxony: 독일 작센 크레이스 즈윅오어 랜드 커ch버그
ko.lifeSummary: Georg Beyer(이)가 1569년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valentin Beyer(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sabina Margaretha Meissner(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1594년 7월 2일 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Sybilla Bauer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1644년 2월 17일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Georg Beyer nasceu em 1569, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Valentin Beyer, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sabina Margaretha Meissner, tinha 24 anos. ru.of Kirchberg, Chemnitz, Saxony: кирчбирг, крис звиккауир ланд, сачсен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Georg Beyer родился в 1569 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Valentin Beyer было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sabina Margaretha Meissner, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybilla Bauer 2 июля 1594 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 17 февраля 1644 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Sybilla Bauer el 2 de julio de 1594, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas.
